name: ValidateTDAccountClosure
businessLogic: Retrieve ReferenceContractDTO from SlotsDTO using REFERENCE_CONTRACT_PARAMS key.
Retrieve current command payload string from SlotsDTO using DOMAIN_CURRENT_COMMAND_PAYLOAD key.
If ReferenceContractDTO is null, throw FbpValidationException with CONTRACT_DETAILS_DO_NOT_EXIST_FOR_THE_GIVEN_PRODUCT error.
If featureType is 'AccountClosure', check maturityDate on ReferenceContractDTO; if null or blank, skip TD maturity validation and return.
If featureType is 'AccountClosure' and maturityDate is present, deserialize currentCommandPayLoad into AccountClosureDTO and build facts list with slotsDTO, closureDTO, and referenceContract.
If featureType is 'TDAccountPreClosure', deserialize currentCommandPayLoad into TDAccountPreClosureDTO and build facts list with slotsDTO, closureDTO, and referenceContract.
If facts list is null (unrecognised featureType), log error and return.
Insert facts into the closure rules WorkingMemory session and fire rules.
Query the rule session using QueryingRules for closure validation result.
If validation result is ':PRE_CLOSURE_INVALID', throw FbpValidationException with ONLY_PRE_CLOSURE_OF_TIME_DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_ALLOWED error.
If validation result is ':MATURITY_CLOSURE_INVALID', throw FbpValidationException with TIME_DEPOSIT_ACCOUNT_YET_TO_REACH_MATURITY error.
Log successful TD account closure validation.
